P/T JUDGE TONI YOUNG, NOT REPORTED, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. GERALDINE L. CHAVIS DEFT. IN PRO PER 2PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. DEFT. PAY PLTF. 945.52 FOR RENT THRU 11/30/94 BY 12/30/94. DEFT. WILL PAY RENT BY THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH PLUS $60.00 PER MONTH. DEFT. WILL PAY $472.76 BY 5PM ON ` 12/30/94 TOWARDS BACK RENT. MONEY PAID APPLIED FIRST TO CURRENT RENT. IF DEFT. NOT CURRENT PLTF. WILL GET ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT. PLTF. ENTITLED TO WRIT OF POSSESSION ON EX PARTE MOTION. PLTF. WILL DISMISSAL IF ALL CONDITIONS OF STIP. MET.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

JUDGE QUIDACHAY, K.LEE/CLERK EX-APPLICATION ON THE RECORD, CONT'D TO MAY 4, 1995 TO CONFIRM DEFT PAY'T OF $ 500 OR SECURING A COMMITMENT OF $500 AND DEFT TO REPORT TO SUNNYDALE, HER ADJUSTED INCOME PLTF TO WRITE CONFIRMING LETTER.
